title: Rename device - Rename
scenario: Device name change via Device Settings > General is not reflected on the Home screen
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Bluetooth audio device connected.
On the Home screen, tap the device name or gear icon to navigate to Device Settings.
Tap on the device's official name field.
Enter new text for the device name.
Tap Done to confirm the name change.
expected: The device's name is changed and the new name is reflected on the Home screen.
